response: I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription, possessing a strong foundation in medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I excel in interpersonal communication, team management, and continuous learning, always striving to improve my skills and contribute to organizational success. I am a multi-tasker who consistently exceeds productivity in transcription, editing, and customer relationship management. I have experience in roles such as medical scribe/editor, supervisor, and quality analyst, with a strong track record of accuracy, efficiency, and adherence to deadlines. I am passionate about my work and committed to delivering high-quality, reliable services in the medical transcription field. I am an Indian national with an On Visit visa and am eager to contribute to a professional and dynamic environment.
